name: getFoundryActors
description: List Foundry VTT actors through the Foundry bridge plugin. Use this to find actor IDs and names for player characters, NPCs, and monsters before creating combatants or loading a specific actor.

type.description: Optional Foundry actor type filter, such as character or npc.

ownedOnly.description: When true, only return actors with player ownership.

combatEligibleOnly.description: When true, only return actors that can reasonably be used to create combatants. Defaults to true.

limit.description: Maximum number of actors to return.

channelKey.description: Optional override for the Foundry bridge channel key. Normally taken from toolsconfig.getFoundryBridge.channelKey.
